name: Ljubica's Curried Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
2. Steam until tender. Cool, bone, and cut into cubes.
3. In a large bowl, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, chutney, ginger, curry powder, and salt.
4. Fold in chicken, celery, and onions. Chill for 2 hours and adjust seasonings.
5. Cut pineapples, including the green tops, in half lengthwise.
6. Carefully cut out fruit, leaving shells approximately 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut some of the fruit into small slices and reserve for garnish.
8. Just before serving, peel and dice avocados and papayas.
9. Fold into chicken mixture.
10. Mound into the pineapple shells and garnish with reserved pineapple slices and watercress.
11. Pass condiments in small bowls.
